hcaptcha-network-error: There was a network error while sending the form. Please ensure you have a working connection and try again.
hcaptcha-loading-indicator-label: Please wait while we finish loading the form...
hcaptcha-missing-token: We’re not quite finished loading the form. Please wait a few seconds, then try again.
hcaptcha-noscript: JavaScript is required to continue. Turn on JavaScript in your browser settings and refresh the page.
